message:
feat(Python): Implement 6 more CPython Python/ modules in Zig

- pyarena.zig: Memory arena for AST nodes with strdup/reset
- pystrcmp.zig: Locale-independent string comparison (stricmp, naturalCompare)
- pystrhex.zig: Hex encoding/decoding with separator support
- pystrtod.zig: String to double conversion (PyOS_string_to_double)
- structmember.zig: PyMemberDef struct member descriptors
- dtoa.zig: Double to ASCII conversion (David Gay's algorithm)

All implementations include comprehensive tests and follow CPython patterns.
